reviews.title: OK Headphones
reviews.text: I think these headphones are more like 3.5 stars but I rounded up.  I have kind of a small head for an adult female, and still these headphones were too tight.  Usually I can wear headphones made for kids but not these.  These are definitely for smaller heads and small ears since the ear cups get painful after a while since they aren't big enough to fully cover my ears.  The sound is o.k., nothing to write home about, but for the price (as of this review these head phones cost $19.44) I think they are worth it.  Great for kids, not so good for adults, even if you are a pinhead.

reviews.title: High quality headphones
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 4th grade child to use at school. It is hard to find headphones with plug-ins and that aren't wireless. For my son, the ones with a plug are best to use his school issued ipad. These are sturdy and I'm hoping they last the entire school year.

reviews.title: Not really for large heads.
reviews.text: All the talk about "classroom" and "child's" in the Amazon listing really means "this is a small headset." It's not big enough for me. I have a large (7 3/4) head and this thing actually hurts my ears (presses on them too hard). If you need headphones for a child then this would work just fine. Not for me.

reviews.title: Good headphones for kids

reviews.title: I'm not keen on the cover material
reviews.text:
While the Arae Electronic Organizer does what it says, its implementation isn't great.

The double layers of this product has one and a half flap of elastic bands to hold bundled up wires, that's 18 spots total. The rest are two large pockets and a small pocket. That's plenty of room to carry most charging accessories that you'd have with you if you were equipped with tablets and phones. For laptops and cameras, you'll need other solutions. Even action camera chargers may have a hard time fitting in this slim product.

It's not a problem that this thing is pretty much made out of nylon from the outside in but the material that makes up the exterior of this product makes it look cheap. It's a rough, synthetic material that just makes it a bit cheap looking. I think cloth or leather would have been a better choice.

In addition, the zipper sticks, making it hard to quickly open this up to retrieve your wires for charging.

reviews.title: Case closed
reviews.text:
It's pretty amazing how much this will hold and still close up properly. I am using it for many cables and some adapters, and I am also keeping those little instruction manuals that come with everything in one of the zipper pouches. You can keep a lot of cables and adapters in this, and it will still zip up and be small enough for travel.
I like this case a lot.

reviews.title: Smaller than expected
reviews.text: Water proof? Not going to try that. This is super slim so you can't really fit a whole lot in. Wires, maybe... but devices, like portable routers, not exactly. Slim portable chargers, sure. Higher capacity batteries, nope. Won't fit anything more than two iPhones thick.

reviews.title: No More Ziplock Bags
reviews.text: This is such a better alternative to tossing cables into a ziplock bag.  The nice bag with zipper allows me to keep everything in one place.  I wished the compartments were a little wider, but it's easy to just use two compartments. Nice quality bag, once I get spares I would just pack these with a spare ready and be ready to go anytime.  Nice organization addition to my travel gear.

reviews.title: Handy little case
reviews.text: Does a good job at cutting down on cable clutter. I took a black Sharpie and identified the various cords by writing abbreviations on the cloth stretch band that secures the cords. It also helps organize miscellaneous adapters and charging units. Not sure how long it will last but for organizing cords and small electronic items it’s a good buy.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text:
First I like sound! I'm an audiophile at heart but in my life now I'm an audiophile on a BUDGET! These are my first bluetooth speakers. More on that in a minute.

I was looking for on ear bluetooth speakers with a budget of about $50 to $60 and was set on waiting for a sale on the JBL EB45T but then saw these recommended on the wirecutter website (a pretty good review site in my opinion)

There is nothing wrong with these, but nothing really right about them either. They have a nice neutral sound that you can listen to for a long time. For movies and youtube on my computer, they are great. But there is nothing in the sound that is going to wow you either. Trust me if there was something actually wrong with the sound, I'd be telling you. You can listen to these for a long time without ear fatigue. If you are looking for lots of rumble for movies, these probably aren't the right phones for you. But if your movie listening requirements are more modest then these work well for that. For casual background music, podcasts, audiobooks, they will work really well for that.

Isolation is not great. I think the plastic is thin so a certain amount of noise gets in. I wanted to be able to hear a little bit of background noise, things going on in the house, but these push my limit for how much I want to hear. Even though they were open-back my Sennheiser HD-229 did a better job with isolation because of the design of the pad.

Comfort isn't bad and for my ears, the ear cup size is just about right size. I wish the earpieces swiveled a bit more but for my head, they swivel just enough. . They have a left and right and the cups swivel so little that if you have them on the wrong way you will notice.

Bluetooth... These are a pain in the backside on Win 7. When I want to use them I have to go and delete the previous pairing, pair them again and then go to the control panel and set these to be used for output. For movies on the computer, they get out of sync. I even set my movie player (Pot Player which I highly recommend) to use the Bluetooth headphones and they still get out of sync with the audio. I don't know if it's the player, the USB Bluetooth adapter, Windows 7 or some combination of them together.

I like that they can be used with a wire as well as with bluetooth. The controls are a little small, as mentioned by others but I don't have trouble working them.

I also tried the JBL EB45T Bluetooth headphones, which cost almost twice as much, at Target and these sound better overall. The JBL might have had better highs, a little punchier bass but these are more cohesive across the frequency range with nothing tweaked to make them sound 'better'.

Summary: I don't have any other Bluetooth headphones to compare these to but I think most people would be very satisfied with these at this price point for general use. If however, you are looking for audiophile on a budget, it's not here.

reviews.title: The sound quality is fantastic and the battery life is excellent
reviews.text: I've been very impressed by many things in the month that I've had this.  The sound quality is fantastic and the battery life is excellent.  I've owned these for a month and the leather cover over the ear cushion is splitting exposing the foam.  Not sure if this is a fluke or what kind of flaw this is.  I've just been using them at my desk and walking around town, medium use for about 5 weeks, when I noticed it was splitting.

reviews.title: Good sound effects
reviews.text: Good sound effects, but Bluetooth connection is not very reliable, the sound is intermittent, you have to turn it off and repair it with other devices like laptop, iPhone, egg.

reviews.title: These headphones are incredible.
reviews.text: Fantastic value. Amazing sound, light and comfortable. I never write reviews but I was so pleased with this product that I did.

reviews.title: Meh... just OK.  Not worth $100
reviews.text: Read some good reviews and picked it up on sale during prime sale.  To me, these are just OK.  I'm not overly impressed.  For $100 they are not worth it, less than $60, just OK.  I have a pair of motorola solo wireless and those are much better as it pertains to battery life, sound, and durability.  These seem like they are going to break very easily.  They feel extremely cheap.  The sound is not bad but nothing overly impressive.  Battery life is meh, it's giving low battery warnings at 50% levels based on what is reported to my iPhone, Plays that warning message about every 5 minutes or so... stupid.  When I turn it on it takes a bit for it to function with my iPhone 7, Motorola solo pretty much instantly ready.  On a positive note, I've used them with phone calls and no one complains... my Motorola solo there are a few times where people had issues hearing me.

reviews.title: Nice hard case to protect AirPods
reviews.text: This is a nice hard case to use to protect your AirPods if you like to go hiking or running.  This gives you added protection in case it fall or drops. There is a push latch that you use to open the case and a key ring to attach to your backpack.  The latch locks the case so it doesn't come open by mistake and the material of the case is sturdy and is easy to hold.  The pattern on the case is attractive and makes sure you don't see fingerprints. This is a must have for attractiveness and safety .

reviews.title: Cheap Buys Cheap
reviews.text: Not sure what I expected for so little, so shame on me. I'll tell you these made my 9-year-old's ears hurt. I'm not sure how they could cancel any noise, as there is no buffer. I tried the ones she put on and they are very uncomfortable. Returning.

reviews.title: Great product and great price.
reviews.text: We bought a pack of these for my son because he goes through headphones crazy fast; since we bought these, he's still on the first pair. We will be buying more in the future if we have to.

reviews.title: They are priced low enough that a defective or marginal one doesn't sour the price.
reviews.text: Quality control could be a little better, but the price for the multipack is tough to beat.

reviews.title: For the cost… I am super happy with them.
reviews.text: I’m giving these earbuds five stars because they exceed my expectations when they only cost seventy cents each. I find it hard to complain about these, especially considering the cost. The sound is quite adequate for such earbuds. I use these in a classroom setting for kids who either cannot afford earbuds or forget there is at home. They are individually packaged. Nice assortment of colors. Though they are being sold by a US company, I do not show where they are made. I can only assume they are made in China.

reviews.title: Great Sound Just Wish they had a Microphone
reviews.text: Fun colors and love this type of ear plug over the cone shaped style. Listening to music on my phone sounds great  but I wish they had a microphone so I could easily answer calls. Now I have to unplug the earphones when the phone starts to ring and then re-plug after I'm done on the call. I guess they are really designed for use on exclusive music players. The listing is confusing because it says "Bluetooth" which they don't have, but the wire is about 4ft. long so your music unit can easily be kept anywhere convenient. No volume control either so that has to be handled on your phone/music player.

title: 6 Packs(12 Pieces) in-Ear Monitor Replacement Memory Foam Tips 3mm Earplugs Earbud Cover for Balanced Armatured Headphone T-100(Medium, Yellow)
description:
Inner diameter: 3mm Outer diameter:12.5mmSize: Medium QTY: 6 pairs
NO EAR FATIGUE.
These foam earphone tips are softer than silicone tip material, Great elasticity and recovery make the tips perfectly fit your ear canal, very comfortable.
BETTER COMFORT
Slow-rebound material, uniquely breath-activated earmuffs activated by body temperature, gives you a new experience without irritation or fatigue.
PREMIUM SOUND.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
MORE ISOLATION
With the ear canal properly sealed by the earbud tips, you don't need to increase volume to enjoy music in a noisy environment.
LITTLE USING TIPS
Before wearing earbuds, squeeze the sponge tips with your hands, so they will automatically inflate and perfectly fit your ear canal after wearing. That will create better sound insulation. The memory foam is about 11mm high, the largest diameter is about 12mm, and the inner diameter of the catheter is about 3mm.Made of high-quality, environmentally friendly and non-toxic materials, it has the advantages of softer, slower rebound and more durable. Memory foam is characterized by a slow rebound effect, which can change its own shape with external pressure. From the perspective of earplugs, the ear canal varies from person to person, and the memory foam will change their shape according to the individual's ear canal, making them fit the ear canal best, thus achieving more than ordinary eartips cover good wearing comfort, better noise reduction effect, bring better listening experience. Not like other cheap earphone tips, these are high quality memory foam ear bud tips which would not fall apart or disintegrate.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.

reviews.title: Not a quality product
reviews.text: I needed these to fit my Sony earbuds which are always smaller than normal earbuds. I've used Comply in the past and loved them but they're expensive. Should have bought them anyway. These are small plastic tubes inserted into blue memory foam. The tubes don't stretch to wrap around the tip of the earbud the way quality products do and the tubes are apparently not glued to the memory foam as they separate when you're trying to install them.

reviews.title: Hold really well
reviews.text: Really like these foam tips. They hold extremely well in my ears whether I'm hitting hitting the punching bag, jogging or cutting grass.

reviews.title: The quanity you get for the price + the quality is excellent
reviews.text: I like the comfort, quality, and price of these replacement earbuds.  The foam holds up well to use, they never fall off, and they do block out sound around you but not so much you can't hear that someone spoke to you.  The price and quantity is the best on Amazon

reviews.title: Not so great
reviews.text: I bought these as an inexpensive replacement for my ear buds. They took quite a bit of twisting and pushing to get into my ear without feeling like they would fall out. With that, after just a couple days, the outer section broke away from the inner so they no longer fit on the ear bud. I do not recommend purchasing.

reviews.title: Perfect replacement size
reviews.text: Very comfortable, noise isolating, fits my older Phillips SHR 9850 earbuds like new. Like the color because you can tell when they are dirty & need to be replaced.

reviews.title: Nice little bud case
reviews.text: I could imagine a few other ways to utilize this little zippered case, designed for earbuds. But, it works very well for it's intended purpose. Even for some styles that have the 'wrap around' type support, as shown in my pics. It was a little snug, but they fit. The standard buds (either wired or wireless) fit much better. The case itself is nice 'pleather', good zipper and nicely appointed swivel snap to attach it to whatever you want to hang it on. My wife chose the natural leather color to go with one particular purse. She hangs it on the outside of the purse, like a 'bling' effect. Looks great. Good purchase. Five stars.

reviews.title: Just what the doctor ordered
reviews.text: I was looking for a case that would hold my slightly over-sized earbuds without it being too large or too bulky. These fit perfectly in my briefcase and there is plenty of room for my over-sized buds. It's a really  attractive case  for the money. I'm not sure if that is real leather, but who cares as long as they protect  what's inside. The added hook comes in handy since I can attach it to a loop in my briefcase so that it doesn't sink to the bottom and I have to dig for it.

reviews.title: Well made
reviews.text: Very well made.  Anticipate it lasting a very long time.  plenty of room. Use it to hold my headset for cellphone.  Very pleased with product.

reviews.title: Garbage do not purchase
reviews.text: Extremely cheaply made. The wires are super long and tangle within moments of use. I bought them for my son because he always loses them but he hasn't had a pair last long enough to lose. They're junk don't waste ur money.

reviews.title: Quantity over Quality
reviews.text: You can only hear sound from one side for some of the earbuds, and they're pretty fragile. Trying to untangle one of them ended up with me ripping off some of the plastic and exposing the wires accidentally. I also only received 91 earbuds instead of the promised 100. I would buy again though, just because it's so cheap.

title: 2 Pack iPhone Earbuds [Apple MFi Certified] Wired in-Ear Stereo Noise Canceling Isolating Lightning Headphones with Built-in Microphone&Volume Control Compatible with iPhone 13 12 SE 11 X 8 7-All iOS
description:
Using the Step
1.Quick and Easy Connection scheme one:After plugging in the headphones, a window will appear, click "Connect with iCloud" to use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets". 2.Connection scheme two: a.The first time you use it, you need to enter the iPhone settings and turn on Bluetooth. b.Bluetooth page: Find "Baets" in Other Devices, click "Baets" to connect(The headset will automatically connect to your device the next time, so you don’t need to do this step again.) Need Attention: It must be connected to Bluetooth for normal use. And it must always be connected to Bluetooth during use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets".
features: 【Widely Compatibility】: Compatible with all lightning connector devices.Headphone are widely compatible with iPhone 14/14 Pro/14 Pro Max/14 Mini/13/13 Pro/13 Pro Max/13 Mini/12 Mini/12 Pro Max/SE/11 Pro Max/11 Pro/XS Max/X/XR/8/8 Plus/7 Plus/7 Support All iOS Systems.Plug and Play!!!

Music and Volume controller is designed to play/pause music, volume up/down, next & previous track, answer/end calls Wake up Siri. No need to take out the phone from your bags or pocket when performing these operations,emancipating your hands.

【Easy connection,two ways】:1.The first:After plugging in the headphones, a window will appear, click "Connect with iCloud" to use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets". 2.The second: a.The first time you use it,enter the iPhone settings and turn on Bluetooth. b.Bluetooth page: Find "Baets" in Other Devices, click "Baets" to connect(It will automatically connect to your device next time) Note: It must be connected to Bluetooth for normal use.

【Comfortable Wearing Experience】: The earphones for iPhone with ergonomic angular design and soft & premium ear tips, allow you to listen to the music for a long time without pain perception and keep a long sense of comfort during the wear. reviews.title: Great Headset at a Cheap Price
reviews.text:
Excellent hands free headset that work great with the Avaya model 9608G phone.
Based on the cheap price, I was not anticipating something that worked this good.
The overall construction is good and the sound quality at both ends is good as well.
Since purchasing the first set, we have purchased several more sets for others in our office. All of which have worked great. Just plug then into the headset jack on the back of the phone and you are ready to go, nothing more to do.
It would have been nice if they offered a headset dual headphones to block out more background noise. I did inquire, but they don't.
Overall, myself and others using them in our office, are happy with them.

Fit like a glove, easy to install and remove
Package Include: 1 x AirPods 1&2 Case ; 1 x Carabiner clip.
features: Compatibility: This AirPod Case compatible with AirPods 2 2019 and Airpod 1 2018.
Cute Rabbit Ear Design: Super fashion and cute plush protective case makes your Airpods case look more fashionable and unique.
Material: Carefully selected upgraded PC shell and faux fur cover, anti-static, anti fingerprint, farewell to dust.
Protection: Comprehensive protection, anti-seismic and anti falling, effective care for airpods case; do not scratch your Airpods.

Comfortable Hand Feeling: Comfortable touch, easy to hold, comfortable, use high-quality artificial wool, warm your hands. Comes with an metal anti-lost Carabiner clip, making it convenient and secure to carry your AirPods anywhere.

reviews.title: Gift
reviews.text: Christmas gift for granddaughter

reviews.title: The hook doesn't remain closed
reviews.text: The hook doesn't remain closed... reordered new one same issue ..just returning item in total ..

reviews.title: Almost lost my AirPods because of this case.
reviews.text:
Had my AirPods attached to my phone case until it wasn’t.
On the first day I tried this case out on my phone, I almost lost my AirPods. I was Christmas shopping and had my phone in my back pocket the entire time. When I got home I noticed my AirPods wasn’t attached to my phone. So, I hopelessly went back to the first store I was at and there they were, on the parking lot floor! Thankfully no one had seen them! So no thanks to this case I have my AirPods.

reviews.title: All it needs is a hole for a clip and it would be perfect
reviews.text: I just like to attach my airpod covers to the case so it makes it inflexible when it doesn't offer a hole on the side to put a clip or keychain thru. Super cute tho!
